NAME: GWASLab
DESCRIPTION: a python package for handling GWAS sumstats.
MANUAL_CITATION: GWASLab preprint: He, Y., Koido, M., Shimmori, Y., Kamatani, Y. (2023). GWASLab: a Python package for processing and visualizing GWAS summary statistics. Preprint at Jxiv, 2023-5. https://doi.org/10.51094/jxiv.370
